compiled_state.title: Fix stale Phase 7 ref in test-sprint-continuation-guidance.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description: Lines 5/32/36 reference Phase 7 but should be Phase 6 after renumbering. Test passes but description is misleading.

comments.body: Investigation: test-sprint-continuation-guidance.sh references Phase 7 correctly. Sprint SKILL.md Phase 7 (Remediation Loop) still exists at that number. The renumbering this bug anticipated did not occur. All 4 test assertions pass. No code change needed — bug appears invalid.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
